title: MironVT Texture
description: a cute texture based on stars, flowers and Miron's pngtuber
body:
**It is a cute GUI (and Hotbar) based on the stars, flowers and MironVT's pngtuber, this texture also changes the armos and some items**

---
**This GUI is a commission that I made for MironVT with permission to be shared! ![logo of the texture pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33d5fa8bb48f67f35e704e9d800aab559fdb9c27.gif)**

**All the artwork that is presented visually such as the title screen or the icons are completely created by me (˶ˆᗜˆ˵)**
